description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: 2. Administration. The Spark Foundation administers compensation from its approved operating budget.

3. Timing & Proration. The compensation structure goes into effect by December 1st 2025, with first payment being made January 2026. Payment is made monthly in arrears and prorated for partial months of service.
4. Eligibility & Clawback. Payment requires the Delegate to be in good standing and to have met responsibilities in
[A.6.1.1.1.3.1.3.3 - Delegate Responsibilities](f230ba4e-eb5a-444e-b07a-13a0292338bd) during the covered period; the Spark Foundation may withhold or claw back amounts for non-performance or breach.
5. No Waiver of Oversight. Compensation does not limit or waive any onboarding, renewal, or offboarding requirements.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
